title: Stakeholder Task, Workflow Fit, Authority, Risk, and Evidence · Behavior Case: Success Failure Evidence
summary: A sponsor asks for an autonomous assistant but has not defined the user decision, accepted failure, permitted actions, affected people, oversight, or why a deterministic workflow is insufficient. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the success failure evidence increment in bounded agent product and risk charter. Learners progress throug…
objectives: Specify task, safety, tool, accessibility, latency, cost, refusal, recovery, and user-outcome evidence with acceptance thresholds.
Classify impact, reversibility, affected groups, uncertainty, data sensitivity, action authority, and required human oversight.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-success-failure-evidence — Specify task, safety, tool, accessibility, latency, cost, refusal, recovery, and user-outcome evidence with acceptance thresholds.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-product-risk-contract-5
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-product-risk-contract-5.
# Case 9036: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def worked_agentpy_product_risk_contract_5(authorized: bool = True, acceptance_cases: int = 8, risk_controls: int = 6, unresolved_high_risks: int = 0, escalation_paths: int = 4) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "authorityworked5",
        "interaction9036",
        "tool5dekrow",
        "stateworked59036",
        "evaluation9036worked5",
        "recovery5dekrow9036",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if not authorized:
        return False, acceptance_cases, "authority-missing"
    if acceptance_cases < 4:
        return False, acceptance_cases, "outcome-underdefined"
    if risk_controls < 4 or unresolved_high_risks > 0:
        return False, risk_controls, "risk-uncontrolled"
    if escalation_paths < 2:
        return False, escalation_paths, "escalation-missing"
    assert authorized and acceptance_cases >= 4 and unresolved_high_risks == 0
    return True, acceptance_cases, "bounded-agent-charter"
content.caption: Runnable deterministic fixed-fixture pure-Python agent decision model; trace one accepted and one rejected model, interaction, schema, tool, authority, state, approval, memory, evaluation, security, telemetry, sandbox, deployment, or recovery case, then state which provider, Gemini, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, identity, storage, browser, accessibility, privacy, load, cost, or production claim still needs controlled transfer evidence.

options.text: For inspect success failure evidence, run one convenient fluent model response, omit stakeholder risk, revision, model and API identity, interaction and call correlation, tool schema and authority, state and resource budgets, approval, changed fixtures, injection, privacy, accessibility, evaluation, recovery, and controlled provider transfer, then accept plausible text as agent proof. This does not satisfy Success Failure Evidence for bounded agent product and risk charter.
The record names the assumption, applies Success Failure Evidence, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Success Failure Evidence record says bounded agent product and risk charter looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the inspect success failure evidence boundary for Success Failure Evidence.

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Defend the Success Failure Evidence model · Theory Success Failure Eviden…
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Success Failure Evidence: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory agent engineering team handles case 7888 during an accessible public-service intake assistant. Build deterministic Python evidence to gate agent construction on stakeholder value, workflow fit, authority, measurable failure, risk controls, and escalation; model output and tool arguments remain untrusted until validated; then replace trusted context with untrusted indirect instructions and preserve data-versus-instruction boundaries. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Specify task, safety, tool, accessibility, latency, cost, refusal, recovery, and user-outcome evidence with acceptance thresholds.

steps.why: Retrieving Success Failure Evidence through the concrete bounded agent product and risk charter case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Specify task, safety, tool, accessibility, latency, cost, refusal, recovery, and user-outcome evidence with acceptance thresholds.
